CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF DEC-12-2008 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF

HEARING ON APPLICANT/PLAINTIFF LINDA TRIEU'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT AND COUNSEL, MARTHA BRIDGAM. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND COURT FEES AND COSTS. FEE WAIVER DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. LINDA TRIEU HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: E. BURA; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE CSR# 4280 (D206)
